_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Presence and expression of transgenes in the immortalized lines was confirmed via WGS and transcript mapping...Virtually no transcripts from the non-immortalized cells aligned with the transgenes
details: hTERT transgene expression confirmed via WGS and transcript mapping in immortalized cell lines, with virtually no transcripts from non-immortalized cells aligning with the transgenes
